title: Morning Light
excerpt: The sun arrives not like a conqueror but like a question…
excerpt_si: හිරු පැමිණෙන්නේ ජේතෘයෙකු ලෙස නොව ප්‍රශ්නයක් ලෙසය…

title: The Waiting
excerpt: In doorways we become the space between arrival and departure…

title: Roots
excerpt: My grandmother's hands were maps of a country I never knew…
